_comment: City buckets for raw entity slugs. Tinder shows a profile's distance from Adithya's current location (Austin). Phone area codes resolve to cities when known. SD rolls into LA per geographic SoCal grouping.
_renaming_rule: On scrape, recompute city. If it changed, rename the file (slug = first-source-city) and add the old slug to previous_slugs[] in frontmatter so wiki links stay resolvable.
